name: 26"x26" Stitch Stripe Euro Throw Pillow Cover Tan - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a stylish, textured touch to your bedding or favorite seating spot with this Stitch-Stripe Euro Throw Pillow Cover from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The cotton-linen square pillow cover has a jacquard woven surface in tan with a stitched stripe pattern, and it sports a hidden zipper closure for easy tucking in and removal of the pillow insert. Plus, the machine-washable construction makes cleaning a breeze.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
